items.name_en: M25445 White Ostrich. Inspired by Louis Vuitton trunks, this Slim Trunk handbag features ostrich leather with riveted borders and a metal S-lock, showcasing an avant-garde rock style. The glossy chain and adjustable leather shoulder strap are detachable, offering multiple carrying options. 23 x 12 x 4 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M355 Top-tier Original This Nano Speedy Bag is made of raffia hand-woven by Malagasy artisans, featuring removable Louis Vuitton leather appliqué to highlight brand style, paired with top handle and removable, adjustable shoulder strap.
items.name_cn:
M355 Top-tier Original This Nano Speedy Bag is made of raffia hand-woven by Malagasy artisans, featuring removable Louis Vuitton leather appliqué to highlight brand style, paired with top handle and removable, adjustable shoulder strap.
Gift box packaging may be reasonably adjusted based on stock and may differ from the style shown on the product page; please refer to the actual received packaging style. 9 x 9 x 7.5 cm (L x H x W)
	•	% Raffia
	•	Calfskin trim
	•	Metal hardware
	•	Zipper closure
	•	Removable logo appliqué
	•	Strap: Removable, adjustable
	•	Strap half-length: 45.5 cm
	•	Strap half-length adjustable to: 54 cm
	•	Handle: Double handle

items.name_en: M4 Dynamic Code Chip Top-tier Original This Croissant Medium Bag is made of raffia hand-woven by Malagasy artisans, paired with soft calfskin trim and Louis Vuitton Paris leather appliqué. Removable shoulder strap is adjustable on both sides, allowing for crossbody or shoulder carry options.
items.name_cn:
M4 Dynamic Code Chip Top-tier Original This Croissant Medium Bag is made of raffia hand-woven by Malagasy artisans, paired with soft calfskin trim and Louis Vuitton Paris leather appliqué. Removable shoulder strap is adjustable on both sides, allowing for crossbody or shoulder carry options.
Gift box packaging may be reasonably adjusted based on stock and may differ from the style shown on the product page; please refer to the actual received packaging style. 5.5 x 5.5 x 5.5 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: M4 Green, M94 Black, M95 Brown, M3 Off-White, M97 Brown. Top-tier original. The exquisite and practical Lock It MM bag features refined Taurillon leather and smooth calfskin, accented with gold-finish buckles and hardware. The iconic House style includes a padlock, key charm, and embossed Louis Vuitton signature. Equipped with a hinged top handle and a detachable strap, this tote offers multiple carrying options.
items.name_cn:
M4 Green, M94 Black, M95 Brown, M3 Off-White, M97 Brown. Top-tier original. The exquisite and practical Lock It MM bag features refined Taurillon leather and smooth calfskin, accented with gold-finish buckles and hardware. The iconic House style includes a padlock, key charm, and embossed Louis Vuitton signature. Equipped with a hinged top handle and a detachable strap, this tote offers multiple carrying options.
3x9x5 cm
(Long x Height x Width)
Black
Taurillon leather, smooth calfskin half-leather decoration, microfiber lining
Gold-finish square buckle padlock, key charm
Exterior pocket
1 interior flat pocket
Zippered interior pocket and flat pocket
5 protective metal studs
Strap: Detachable, adjustable
Drop: 45 cm
Max strap drop: 5 cm
